# mihari_on_call_calendar (Resource)

Manages a Mihari on-call calendar.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "mihari_on_call_calendar" "engineering" {
  name        = "Engineering On-Call"
  description = "Primary engineering on-call rotation"
  is_active   = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the on-call calendar.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the on-call calendar.
- `is_active` (Boolean) Whether the calendar is active.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `id` (String) UUID of the on-call calendar.
- `updated_at` (String) Last update timestamp.
